qa_pairs.question: Which cities have the hanzi exactly equal to 绍兴/ 紹興?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.hanzi = '绍兴/ 紹興'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which city entities with hanzi equal to '绍兴/ 紹興'?

qa_pairs.question: Which cities have an August temperature of at least 23.9 and an October temperature exactly equal to 22.8?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.aug >= 23.9 AND temperature.oct = 22.8
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which city entities having at least one related temperature record (linked on city.city_id = temperature.city_id) with aug at least '23.9' and oct equal to '22.8'?
